title: jamiepine/voicebox
friendlyTitle: Voicebox: an open-source AI voice studio
summary: Voicebox is an open-source AI voice studio for voice cloning, speech generation, dictation, transcription and agent voice integrations. It supports local-first workflows, multiple TTS engines, Whisper-based speech-to-text, a desktop app and MCP integration.
friendlySummary: Voicebox helps you clone voices, create speech, dictate text and connect voice features to AI agents.
whyItMatters: Use it to experiment with private voice workflows, prototype voice interfaces, build agent speech features or replace cloud-only voice tools with a local-first stack.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It is useful if you want to test AI voice tools while keeping more of the work on your own machine.
